Patch Set 1:

Builds for x86_64 centos7,rhel8.5 successful
Job output URL: https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/21791/results.html

 Commencing initial testing: runtests@ldiskfs+DNE runtests-ssk@ldiskfs+SharedKey runtests@zfs

Patch Set 1:

Sebastien,

Can you take a look here?  I examined the debug carefully and I seem to be successfully/correctly getting the inode in all cases, but sanity-sec 40 is still failing.  (I added the !PageAnon check, which I wasn't sure was necessary, but it didn't help.)

Do you see anything wrong?  I am wondering if this is a bug in the security code

Patch Set 1:

(2 comments)

2 style warning(s).
For more details please see http://wiki.lustre.org/Lustre_Coding_Style_Guidelines

Patch Set 1:

Andreas,

Before you say anything about test-parameters...  Charlie says the regex is case-insensitive now :)

Patch Set 1:

> Andreas,
 > 
 > Before you say anything about test-parameters...  Charlie says the
 > regex is case-insensitive now :)

The regexp may be case insensitive, but contrib/git-hooks/commit-msg is not and would report an error if it was being run (as it should be), since this used to cause an autotest failure... :-)

parents.subject: LU-15567 llite: Do not use page2inode for DIO

commit.subject: LU-15567 tests: Debug & testing
commit.message:
LU-15567 tests: Debug & testing

More testing for sanity-sec failures with page2inode.

Sanity-sec test 40 is still failing.

test-parameters: trivial
test-parameters: testlist=sanity-sec

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I378bac04f724f905923803c39461c7e8ce92840d
